SHARE PURCHASE AGREEMENT (the "SPA")

This Share Purchase Agreement is made on this 12th day of October, 2023, by and between:

Seller: Dr. Henry Tan, NRIC No. S2345678B, residing at 123 Orchard Road, Singapore 238888. Contact: +65 9123 4567, Email: henry.tan@samplemail.sg.

Buyer: Ms. Clara Lim, NRIC No. S8765432C, residing at 456 Marina Bay, Singapore 018956. Contact: +65 9876 5432, Email: clara.lim@fakemail.sg.

Company: Quantum Solutions Pte. Ltd., UEN: 200312345W, having its registered office at 789 Suntec Tower, Singapore 049712.

Purchase Price: SGD 1,500,000 (One Million Five Hundred Thousand Singapore Dollars).

The Seller agrees to sell, and the Buyer agrees to purchase, 100% of the issued shares of Quantum Solutions Pte. Ltd. subject to the terms and conditions set forth in this SPA.

The SPA does not include any provisions for project plan assessments or evaluations of project status updates. The Parties agree that all obligations and representations are limited to those explicitly stated herein.

For further reference, Dr. Tan's details can be verified at https://example.sg/user/S2345678B.
